creator: lloydsystems1@tpg.com.au
text:
Overview:
Some email functions of the Nextcloud mail app display a overlay/pop-up window, but this window disappears after 4-5 seconds. I have found this with the "move message" and "view source" functions.

Steps to Reproduce:
Select any email from the message list. In the message detail panel, select the 3 dots, then "move message" or "view source". A pop-up window appears. 

Actual Results:
The pop-up disappears after 4-5 seconds. This happens for any message, every time.

Expected Results:
The pop-up window remains until action completed by user.

Additional Information:
Pop-up windows from actions in the message list panel, such as "move thread", do not disappear.
The problem occurs on different Windows PC clients and using both Chrome and Firefox browsers, so it would appear to be a server side issue.
I do not recall this happening before upgrading Nextcloud to version 27.1.0.

Software Versions:
FreeBSD version is 13.2-p4. The Nextcloud software installed is:
nextcloud-php82             27.1.0 
nextcloud-calendar-php82    4.5.1
nextcloud-contacts-php82    5.4.2
nextcloud-mail-php82        3.4.0
nextcloud-notes-php82       4.8.1
